overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing Aloy exploring a bioluminescent tribal settlement at night. The character moves from an outdoor overlook into interior corridors and up through the settlement's wooden structures, passing NPC villagers and glowing organic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overlook platform with valley view

events.description: character begins walking left along the wooden platform toward the building entrance
approaching the entrance to the tribal building structure

agents.ego_description: standing on overlook platform observing the misty valley, then walking toward the building entrance

entered.detail: large ruined metallic structure with jagged edges silhouetted against the night sky
dense fog-covered forest stretching into the distance under moonlight
elevated wooden deck with woven railings providing scenic views
arched entrance to the settlement structure with organic woven architecture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a high wooden overlook platform at night, with Aloy gazing out over a misty forest valley. A large broken metal structure looms on the right. She then walks left along the platform toward the entrance of a tribal building, moving from the open air into the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered interior corridor with woven walls

events.description: entering the tribal building from the outdoor overlook
interior lighting shifts from warm hanging lanterns to green bioluminescent glow

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered entrance corridor into the darker interior of the settlement

entered.detail: intricately woven bamboo and wood walls forming the corridor structure
warm yellow lanterns suspended from the ceiling providing initial interior lighting
thick curved wooden beams supporting the arched ceiling
green glowing organic lights embedded in the ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: Aloy enters the tribal building, transitioning from the open night air to an enclosed corridor with woven bamboo walls. The lighting shifts from moonlight to warm hanging lanterns, then to an eerie green bioluminescent glow as she moves deeper into the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: settlement common area with bioluminescent plants

events.description: encountering NPC villagers in the settlement interior
approaching the exit archway leading back outside

agents.ego_description: walking through the settlement interior passing by NPCs and bioluminescent plant structures

notable_agents.action: villager standing near woven baskets observing the surroundings
villager walking through the common area carrying items

entered.detail: large glowing green plants growing in woven planters providing ambient light
large round baskets made of woven fibers used for storage
elevated wooden platforms holding various settlement goods
large arched opening leading from interior to exterior settlement areas

segments.scene_description: Moving into a more open interior common area, Aloy encounters sparse crowds of NPC villagers among glowing bioluminescent plants and woven storage structures. The space features wooden shelves and a large exit archway ahead leading back outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior wooden stairway ascending through settlement

events.description: exiting the interior to exterior wooden stairways of the settlement
beginning steep ascent up wooden stairs toward upper settlement levels

agents.ego_description: climbing steep wooden stairs through the settlement exterior, passing under thatched structures

notable_agents.action: villager descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: steep staircase made of wooden logs leading upward through the settlement
buildings with curved roofs made of woven thatch and organic materials
dark blue night sky with scattered clouds visible between structures
massive central building with intricate carved details at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: Aloy exits the interior through an archway into the exterior settlement, ascending steep wooden stairs. The path winds upward between thatched-roof structures under a partial night sky, with bioluminescent plants lighting the way and a large tribal structure visible at the summit.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper settlement plaza with central gathering space

events.description: entering populated plaza area with multiple NPC villagers
turning right to explore the upper plaza area and examine structures

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper settlement plaza observing NPCs and examining the large central tribal structure

notable_agents.action: group of villagers walking together through the plaza
villager sitting near the building wall resting

entered.detail: open cobblestone-paved area at the top of the settlement for gathering
tall carved wooden columns with tribal patterns supporting overhead structures
small green glowing lights embedded along the pathway edges

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, Aloy enters a wide plaza populated with moderate crowds of villagers. The area features decorative carved pillars, bioluminescent ground lighting, and a massive central tribal structure. She turns to explore the space, observing the settlement's inhabitants and intricate architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high, misty overlook into the glowing heart of a bioluminescent tribal settlement. It begins on a wooden platform overlooking a dark forest valley and a broken metal structure, moving left as Aloy transitions from the open night air into a tribal building. As she moves deeper into the structure, the moonlight gives way to warm lanterns and an eerie green bioluminescent glow within woven bamboo corridors, eventually opening into a common area filled with villagers and glowing plants. The scene then shifts back outdoors as she passes through a large archway and ascends steep wooden stairs that wind upward between thatched-roof buildings. Finally, the camera reaches a wide summit plaza where the path opens up to reveal decorative carved pillars and a massive central tribal structure surrounded by a crowd of inhabitants.
